title: How Can I Monitor Mentions of "Carders Forum" Using monday.com for Cybersecurity Alerts?
excerpt: I’m working on a cybersecurity project and need to track suspicious mentions like “Carders forum” across forums and sites. Is there a way to integrate external monitoring tools or alerts into monday.com to flag such keyw…

posts.author: validmarket (validmarket)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m working on a cybersecurity project and need to track suspicious mentions like “Carders forum” across forums and sites. Is there a way to integrate external monitoring tools or alerts into monday.com to flag such keywords automatically in our project dashboard?
